findings.summary: The stale-salvage ledger and maintainer PR examples provide enough evidence to promote a reusable maintainer-owned salvage playbook.
Localization tails remain useful but must stay translator/manual-review only.
Release, npm, plugin, billing, and announcement actions remain outside this evaluator run and require separate approval.

recommended_next_action.action: Use the promoted playbook for future stale cleanup batches and add additional evaluator/RAG scenarios for CI failure diagnosis, harness-config drift, billing readiness, and AgentShield policy exceptions.
